_instructions: Work experience. companyDomain is used to pull a brand logo via Clearbit.

experiences.title: Senior Java Full Stack Engineer — Microservices & AI Integration
experiences.description: Designing cloud-native Spring Boot microservices and React dashboards for financial workflow automation, with LLM-powered document intelligence built on AWS Bedrock.
responsibilities: Designed scalable Spring Boot microservices and REST APIs powering financial workflow automation
Built React dashboards for real-time transaction tracking and approval workflows
Integrated AWS Bedrock / OpenAI LLM pipelines for automated document extraction and validation
Tuned PostgreSQL to cut reporting query times by 25%
Hardened distributed services with OAuth 2.0 and JWT authentication
Containerized and shipped workloads to Kubernetes (EKS) through Jenkins CI/CD
Drove test coverage with JUnit, Mockito and TestContainers

experiences.title: Java Full Stack Engineer — Microservices & AWS Cloud
experiences.description: Shipped shipment-lifecycle microservices and event-driven pipelines on AWS that kept operational dashboards live for vendors, billing, and logistics teams.
responsibilities: Built Spring Boot microservices for shipment lifecycle, vendor onboarding and billing validation
Designed React operational dashboards for real-time shipment tracking
Authored Apache Kafka event pipelines processing millions of shipment updates
Applied rule-based automation for anomaly detection in logistics data
Secured services with OAuth 2.0, JWT and role-based access control
Maintained Jenkins CI/CD pipelines and Docker/Kubernetes deployments
Managed AWS infrastructure — EC2, EKS, S3 and IAM

experiences.title: Java Backend Engineer
experiences.description: Built backend modules for enterprise order-processing systems — REST APIs, relational data models, and server-rendered UI with Thymeleaf.
responsibilities: Developed Java / Spring / Hibernate backend modules for order processing systems
Designed REST APIs for frontend–backend communication
Built server-rendered UI with Thymeleaf and Bootstrap
Modeled relational schemas and optimized SQL on MySQL and Oracle
Wrote JUnit tests and investigated production incidents from service logs
